description_long: This is a vintage-style arcade game cabinet with a weathered, yellow and black exterior, showing signs of rust and wear. The front features a large screen with pixelated graphics and the words 'INSERT COIN', above a control panel with several colored buttons and a joystick. The marquee at the top displays the game title 'JUMP TANK' in bold, playful lettering, surrounded by retro game graphics. The side panels are decorated with the same 'JUMP TANK' branding and pixelated platform imagery, including small tank and animal icons. The back of the cabinet is plain, with a metal access panel and visible screws. The overall structure is boxy and robust, typical of classic arcade machines found in urban entertainment venues.
description: A weathered, yellow and black arcade game cabinet with 'JUMP TANK' branding, pixelated graphics, and a classic control panel. The cabinet features retro artwork and a prominent screen for gameplay.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with 'INSERT COIN', control panel with buttons and joystick, and the marquee with 'JUMP TANK' artwork.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the 'JUMP TANK' logo and pixelated platform graphics, with visible wear and screws.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, yellow back with a large metal access panel and no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'JUMP TANK' branding and pixelated graphics, highlighting the cabinet's boxy shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size with visible bezel and retro pixel graphics
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a row, no visible trackballs or spinners
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'JUMP TANK' in bold, colorful letters with pixelated platform and tank graphics, matching the retro game theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display 'JUMP TANK' in large, bold letters with pixelated green platforms and small tank and animal icons, set against a dark, weathered background
